name: swing-tennis
description: Swing Tennis — a browser 3D tennis game you play with your phone as the racket.

scripts._comment: --include=dev is required: hosts set NODE_ENV=production, which makes npm skip devDependencies — and vite, the thing that builds the client, is one. The server has no dev deps, so its install stays lean.
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server install --omit=dev
